base-min.$description: Tokens used as the default or "mid-point" in your minimum size scale will have this value without any changes. So when you adjust only the multiplier token, this is not affected.

base-max.$description: Tokens used as the default or "mid-point" in your maximum size scale will have this value without any changes. So when you adjust only the multiplier token, this is not affected.

multiplier-min.$description: Change the value of this token to modify every token in the minimum scales.

multiplier-max.$description: Change the value of this token to modify every token in the maximum scales.

factor.$description: For when you want your math equations to always land on a 4/8 pixel grid, set the factor token value to that number.

description.$description: Change the values in knobs to adjust the type, space and grid constants for minimum and maximum screen dimensions. These tokens are used in math calculations for fluid responsiveness in web.

min.$description: The smallest breakpoint. The size of type and space will not shrink beyond this viewport width.

max.$description: The largest breakpoint. The size of type and space will not grow beyond this viewport width.

min.$description: The smallest size of a column.

max.$description: The largest size of a column.

sans.$description: This is intended for code. Figma doesn't support selecting a default system font.

serif.$description: This is intended for code. Figma doesn't support selecting a default system font.

mono.$description: This is intended for code. Figma doesn't support selecting a default system font.

sans.$description: This is a plain font family for a consistent styled apperance in the absence of a brand font.

serif.$description: This is a plain font family for a consistent styled apperance in the absence of a brand font.

mono.$description: This is a plain font family for a consistent styled apperance in the absence of a brand font.

sans-primary.$description: Change this value to set the sans serif font for the brand.

sans-secondary.$description: Change this value to set the sans serif font for the brand.

serif-primary.$description: Change this value to set the serif font for the brand.

serif-secondary.$description: Change this value to set the serif font for the brand.

mono-primary.$description: Change this value to set the monospace font for the brand.

mono-secondary.$description: Change this value to set the monospace font for the brand.

sans-primary.$description: Change this value to set the sans serif font for the brand.

sans-secondary.$description: Change this value to set the sans serif font for the brand.

serif-primary.$description: Change this value to set the serif font for the brand.

serif-secondary.$description: Change this value to set the serif font for the brand.

mono-primary.$description: Change this value to set the monospace font for the brand.

mono-secondary.$description: Change this value to set the monospace font for the brand.
